description: Tabbed support hub with live chat, knowledge base search, ticket submission, and account settings.

intent.summary: When the user asks for a support center, help desk, or customer service portal, refer to the AgnosticUI Support Center Playbook.

recipe.layout: Full-width page with a fixed Header. Main content is a four-tab layout: Live Chat, Knowledge Base, Submit a Ticket, and Settings. Each tab fills the remaining viewport height.

components.role: Top-level navigation between the four support sections
Individual chat messages in the Live Chat tab
Article preview modal opened from search results
Ticket history side panel that slides in from the edge
Category and priority dropdowns in the ticket form
Notification preference switches in the Settings tab

recipe.notes:
The Live Chat tab keeps AgMessageBubble items in a scrollable flex column, newest at the bottom. Example AgNode for a chat message:
```json
{ "id": "msg-1", "component": "AgMessageBubble", "props": { "isMe": false, "text": "How can I help you today?" } }
```
